title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS presents five techniques to prevent AI hallucinations and improve agent reliability: semantic tool selection to reduce context window bloat, graph RAG for precise structured queries, multi-agent validation to catch failures, symbolic guardrails via Python code to enforce rules, and runtime steering for agent self-correction. Demonstrations use a travel agent built with Strands Agents framework.
